shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files src/components/Tooltip src | head -80"

/bin/bash -lc "mempal search \"react-tooltip openOnClick delegated document click stopPropagation event delegation\" --json --top-k 5
printf '\\n--- event delegation ---\\n'
sed -n '1,260p' src/components/Tooltip/event-delegation.ts
printf '\\n--- tooltip events ---\\n'
sed -n '1,320p' src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx
printf '\\n--- references ---\\n'
rg -n \"openOnClick|event-delegation|addEventListener|click\" src/components/Tooltip src/test/tooltip-interaction-behavior.spec.js"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '240,580p' src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx
printf '\\n--- package/test status ---\\n'
git status --short
sed -n '1,110p' src/test/tooltip-interaction-behavior.spec.js
sed -n '170,310p' src/test/tooltip-interaction-behavior.spec.js"

/bin/bash -lc 'mempal ingest "$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals
git diff --check
git status --short'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
